About me

Product thinking meets
design execution.

I'm Jennifer Okeke — a Product Manager and Product Designer with hands-on experience building and scaling digital products in fintech and real estate. My work spans defining product strategy, mapping user journeys, designing intuitive flows, and driving measurable business outcomes.

At Salient Software Solutions, I owned end-to-end product operations across AgoPay, AgoGo, BNPL, and Acquire — managing merchant onboarding, KYC compliance, and customer lifecycle optimisation. At RentHub NG, I led the PM strategy to disrupt Nigeria's rental market with a fee-free, VR-powered marketplace.

I work best at the intersection of user empathy, data-informed decisions, and cross-functional collaboration. I thrive when there's a real problem worth solving and a team ready to ship.

Case Studies

Selected work.

Two end-to-end product case studies showing my process from problem identification to shipped outcomes.

Product Operations · Fintech

Salient Software Solutions

AgoPay · AgoGo · BNPL · Acquire — owned end-to-end product operations and customer success across four products serving merchants, consumers, and BNPL customers in the Nigerian fintech ecosystem.

35% faster onboarding
40% faster resolution
30% churn reduction
25% activation uplift

Role & Responsibilities

  • Owned the merchant lifecycle from lead/signup through KYC, bank setup, and activation to first transaction and retention
  • Designed and optimised KYC compliance flow: Profile → KYC 1 → KYC 2 → Approval — reducing onboarding friction and improving verification completion
  • Managed BNPL customer journey across Browse → Checkout → Installment Calculator → Down Payment → Approval → Repayment
  • Built and maintained weekly Product Health Scorecards to surface trends and drive cross-team action
  • Led cross-functional collaboration between engineering, customer success, compliance, and operations

PM Decisions & Approach

  • Prioritised onboarding friction reduction as the highest-leverage intervention — KYC drop-offs were the primary activation blocker
  • Introduced standardised SLA tracking (18-hour resolution target) to bring accountability to issue resolution across squads
  • Designed a churn-risk recovery workflow that identified at-risk merchants and triggered targeted re-engagement — achieving 82% recovery rate
  • Maintained product health visibility through scorecards enabling faster executive decision-making

Product Management · Proptech

RentHub NG

A digital property marketplace designed to disrupt Nigeria's rental ecosystem — eliminating agent fees and fake listings, enabling direct landlord-tenant connections, and reducing physical inspections through virtual reality.

35% search-to-interest lift
40% faster listing setup
60% better tenant screening
7 → 4 discovery steps

Problem Statement

  • High agency fees creating unnecessary cost barriers for tenants in major Nigerian cities
  • Frequent fake listings eroding trust and wasting users' time and money
  • Costly, time-intensive physical inspections limiting access to rental properties
  • Poor tenant screening tools leaving landlords vulnerable to bad actors
  • Limited access to real estate investment opportunities for everyday Nigerians

PM Decisions & Trade-offs

  • Phase 1 deliberately scoped to core marketplace usability — search, listings, verification, and onboarding — before layering advanced features
  • VR viewing and payment infrastructure intentionally deferred to Phase 2 to reduce MVP complexity and validate core demand first
  • User types defined early: tenants/renters, landlords/property owners, and real estate investors — enabling targeted journey mapping per persona
  • Reduced property discovery journey from 7 steps to 4 by eliminating unnecessary friction points in the search-to-inquiry flow

User Discovery Journey (Tenant Flow) — Reduced from 7 to 4 steps

Search
→
Browse Listings
→
View Property
→
Contact Landlord

User Journey Map

Full journey map: Tenant · Landlord · Investor flows with touchpoints and features

Phase 1 — MVP Scope

  • Landing page with clear value proposition
  • Guest browsing and property listings
  • Advanced search with filters
  • User profiles and dashboards
  • Investment portfolio view

Phase 2 — Scale Features

  • VR property viewing mode
  • Identity verification layer
  • Tenant screening tools
  • Integrated payment infrastructure
  • Landlord-tenant messaging

Key Product Screens

Homepage · Property listings · Property details · Tenant dashboard

35% Search-to-Interest Conversion Lift
40% Faster Landlord Listing Setup
60% Better Tenant Screening Efficiency
4 Steps to Property Inquiry (down from 7)
